scripts.build:storybook:android: EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && rm -rf $TMPDIR/metro-cache $TMPDIR/metro-file-map-* && cd android && EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true ./gradlew assembleRelease && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ../storybook.apk
scripts.build:storybook:ios: EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true npx expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && EXPO_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_ENABLED=true xcodebuild -workspace ios/testallthernthings.xcworkspace -scheme testallthernthings -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath ios/build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO && cp -r ios/build/Build/Products/Release-iphonesimulator/testallthernthings.app storybook.app
scripts.build:chromatic: npm run storybook-generate && npm run build:storybook:android && npm run build:storybook:ios && npm run generate-manifest && npm run prepare-chromatic-upload:android && npm run prepare-chromatic-upload:ios
scripts.build:chromatic:ios: npm run storybook-generate && npm run build:storybook:ios && npm run generate-manifest && npm run prepare-chromatic-upload:ios
scripts.build:chromatic:android: npm run storybook-generate && npm run build:storybook:android && npm run generate-manifest && npm run prepare-chromatic-upload:android
scripts.open:storybook:ios: test -d storybook.app || (echo 'storybook.app not found — run build:storybook:ios first' && exit 1) && xcrun simctl install booted storybook.app && xcrun simctl launch booted com.anonymous.testallthernthings
scripts.open:storybook:android: test -f storybook.apk || (echo 'storybook.apk not found — run build:storybook:android first' && exit 1) && adb install -r storybook.apk && adb shell am start -n com.anonymous.testallthernthings/.MainActivity
